messages.content:
Select all that apply

Compared to people who eat meat, being vegetarian has been associated with a lower risk of which of the following disease conditions?

Multiple select question.

Hypertension


Type 2 diabetes


Osteoporosis


Cardiovascular disease
All of the above: Hypertension, Type 2 diabetes, Osteoporosis, and Cardiovascular disease.

A _____ protein lacks or contains inadequate amounts of one or more of the essential amino acids.

Multiple choice question.

complete


nonessential


high-quality


low-quality
low-quality

Select all that apply

Select the nutrients for which vegetarian diets tend to provide more of than the typical American diet.

Multiple select question.

Iron


Vitamin C


Fiber


Potassium
All of the above: Iron, Vitamin C, Fiber, and Potassium.

Which of the following is an example of a dish that includes a complementary combination of protein?

Multiple choice question.

Red beans and rice


Tossed salad with orange slices


Trail mix of dried fruit, walnuts, and almonds


Apple with peanut butter
Red beans and rice

Select all that apply

Poorly planned plant-based diets may provide inadequate amounts of which nutrients?

Multiple select question.

Calcium


Vitamin B-12


Vitamin D


Potassium
All of the above: Calcium, Vitamin B-12, Vitamin D, and Potassium.

A person who relies heavily on plant foods and may or may not include some animal foods in their diet is considered a(n) _____.

Multiple choice question.

carnivore


herbivore


vegan


vegetarian
vegetarian

Vegans can obtain many micronutrients, such as vitamin B-12, vitamin D, iron, and calcium, by consuming _____.

Multiple choice question.

dairy products


whole wheat pasta


fortified soy beverages


fruit
fortified soy beverages

Vegetarian diets are often _____ than "Western diets" that contain plenty of red meat.

Multiple choice question.

higher in fat and protein


lower in phytochemicals and fiber


higher in energy and vitamins


lower in fat and energy
lower in fat and energy

Vegetarian diets generally provide more _____ than typical American diets.

Multiple choice question.

saturated fat


cholesterol


vitamin B-12


phytochemicals
phytochemicals

Which of these nutrients could potentially be a concern if someone is consuming a poorly planned plant-based diet?

Multiple choice question.

Magnesium


Omega-3 fatty acids


Fiber


Vitamin C
Omega-3 fatty acids

Multiple Choice Question
High-protein intakes may be contraindicated for individuals who have _____.

Multiple choice question.

tooth decay


gallstones


kidney disease


gastroesophageal reflux disease
kidney disease

Vegetarians who do not consume fish can still receive the omega-3 fatty acids by _____.

Multiple choice question.

combining complementary plant proteins


eating certain types of algae


eating processed soybean products


consuming dairy products
eating certain types of algae

What is one reason chronically ill, older adults in the United States are at risk for protein deficiency?

Multiple choice question.

They are no longer able to absorb amino acids in the small intestine


They have limited incomes to purchase nutritious foods


They stop liking high-protein foods


Their medications often prevent protein digestion
They have limited incomes to purchase nutritious foods

With which type of vegetarian diet does a person eat eggs, fish, and dairy foods, but not generally meat?

Multiple choice question.

Lactovegetarian


Semivegetarian


Ovovegetarian


Lacto-ovovegetarian
Lacto-ovovegetarian

Select all that apply

Compared to people who eat meat, being vegetarian has been associated with a lower risk of which of the following disease conditions?

Multiple select question.

Type 2 diabetes


Osteoporosis


Cardiovascular disease


Hypertension
All of the above: Type 2 diabetes, Osteoporosis, Cardiovascular disease, and Hypertension.

A food allergy is a reaction that occurs when the _____ system reacts to a harmless substance in food, such as a protein that does not undergo digestion.

Multiple choice question.

respiratory


immune


urinary


digestive
immune
